$comment: v1 — a quest. The five anti-shallow laws are machine-linted where possible (validate.mjs) and human-gated always (status).

giver.$comment: law 1: a name and a wound

wound.description: their history, rooted in the Withdrawal

drawWeights.description: personalization: multipliers applied to this calling's draw chance

text.$comment: law 4: the story clothing on the verb — required, and lint rejects bare counters

params.$comment: The step's real-world condition (validate.mjs enforces this vocabulary; steps with NO params free-continue — back-compat law). By type: goto/escort {near: <anchor>, radius?: px} — the player must stand within radius of the anchor; collect {itemId, qty, consume?: bool} — met when the pack holds qty (consume:true pays the items on advance — the story gives them away); kill {creatureId, count} — per-entry counter fed by the real kill handler; build {workId} — met when one stands; wait {until: 'storm'|'storm-end'|'days', days?: n} — storm rides the great-storm clock, days counts sim-days from step entry; talk {at: <anchor>, radius?: px} — stand where the conversation happens (the named person stays narrative); turn without options may carry collect-shaped params (a toll paid to proceed); choice takes NO params. Anchors (main.gd _calling_anchor_pos): shrine-halor, shrine-maren, shrine-neris, wreck-west, wreck-mid, wreck-east, boss-ring, village, brine-pool, trench-edge.

next.description: next step id; omit on terminal steps

deep.description: tier=deep only — permanent world consequences, per-server-once, never labeled in advance

revealText.description: the later moment the player realizes what they did

status.$comment: law 5: 'curated' is set by Jeff only
